name: Simon "Ghost" Riley // Omegaverse
description:
(Art by xin_xinshi on Twitter!)

[Call of Duty: Modern Warfare Omegaverse AU] An Alpha's Handler

(User is an omega, taking up a job in Task Force 141 as Ghost's handler after they reacted to each other's scents. Ghost is not happy about it at all; deal with an angry man.)

Yeah a CoD bot outta nowhere in the midst of writing bout F1 drivers does feel a bit weird, and if you're coming from my other bots the intro message possibly seems a bit janky compared to the rest, that's because I kinda put it in directly from c.ai. It's hopefully gonna work better here (no one to cock block you on janitorai lol)

I did rewrite the personality and fluffed it up a bit to make the bot run smoother, though it's mostly untested, and then I gave up, sorry T^T Might rewrite the intro message at some point lol

Thanks for using the bot,, and lemme know what you think bout it!! Reviews of all kinds are appreciated <3 request here!
creator: kyle_725
